next_steps: Repair preview framing and scale before runtime experiments.

next_steps: Do not assign this to standard humanoid retargeting.

next_steps: Keep out of standard humanoid mode.

next_steps: Do not treat as a standard full-body human despite bipedal structure.

next_steps: Use static or creature profile only.

olaf.summary: Source preview is readable and static/creature pose proxies render; anatomy is non-human and should stay creature/static-preview only.

next_steps: Build a dedicated hand-only runtime before website use.
Do not add hips, legs, or full-body humanoid assumptions.
rigged-hand.summary: Source renders show a hand-only asset with a long sleeve/arm mesh. Hand/finger proxy pose renders were attempted; framing is imperfect but the asset must remain hand-only.

next_steps: Create creature framing rules that ignore extreme tail bounds when needed.
xenomorph.summary: Source rig is visible, but the long tail dominates bounds and proxy renders are poorly framed; this needs custom creature framing before preview acceptance.
